DEPT. 206, MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-27-2004 IN DEPT. 206, APPELLANT JEFFREY LINDQUIST'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. THE COURT SETS THIS CASE FOR TRIAL ON 9/20/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. NO NEW MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET. PLAINTIFF TO SEND WRITTEN NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES OF TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS DIANNE BOFFI, VERA MU, REPORTER CANDACE YOUNT.
